summary: Delegated the enrichment of the bilingual documentation portal to SubAgent-TechWriter. The subagent successfully expanded the documentation to the standard of a mature open-source project (e.g., Deer-Flow). It added deep-dive explanations of the state machine and artifact taxonomy in CORE_CONCEPTS and ARCHITECTURE, provided concrete JSON/CLI examples in USAGE and TEAM_COLLABORATION, and created a new EXTENSION_GUIDE.md. All documents now feature professional multi-level headers, warning callouts, and comprehensive Mermaid diagrams.
